description_long: This object is a vintage fax machine with a rectangular, wedge-shaped body and a slanted front control panel. The front panel features a full QWERTY keyboard with worn, dark keys and a reddish, weathered surface, suggesting heavy use. Above the keyboard is a monochrome display screen, flanked by two tape or card slots and several small buttons, likely for operational controls. The left side of the machine displays the 'Rêveur' logo and a vent for cooling, while the rear and right sides are solid and unadorned. The overall exterior is constructed from dark, matte-finished metal or plastic, with visible scuffs and signs of age. No visible numeric keypad or telephone handset is present, and the paper tray or output slot is not clearly defined from the available views.
description: A vintage, wedge-shaped fax machine with a worn keyboard, monochrome display, and dark, scuffed exterior. The control panel features slots and buttons, with branding and venting on the side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the slanted control panel with a full keyboard, monochrome display, two slots, and several buttons, all set in a weathered, reddish surface.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the 'Rêveur' logo and a vent, with the control panel edge and part of the keyboard visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, solid back with no visible features, slots, or branding.
description_view_3: The right-front angled view shows the keyboard, display, and slots from a different perspective, emphasizing the machine's wedge shape and worn surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is slanted and occupies the front face, with a full QWERTY keyboard at the bottom, a monochrome display screen above the keyboard, and two horizontal slots with small buttons to the right of the display. Controls are grouped by function, with input at the bottom and operational controls above.
attribute_paper_tray_design: No distinct paper tray is visible; the front panel has two horizontal slots that may serve as input or output, but no adjustable guides or covers are apparent.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is not clearly defined, but the two horizontal slots on the front panel, to the right of the display, may serve as output locations.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visible or attached to the object in any view.
